contexts.Localizable.strings:initial.beta.desc: If you want to rollback to a release version, uncheck "receive beta updates" from Settings > General, and install a stable release from our official website.
contexts.Localizable.strings:initial.debug.desc: Debug builds are usually not optimized for performance, so it is not recommended to be used as daily drive. Debug builds do not support auto update.
contexts.Localizable.strings:initial.nightly.desc: Nightly is not recommended to be used as daily drive. Currently nightly builds do not support auto update. Please manually download newer builds from our nightly website.

contexts.OpenURLWindowController.strings:m0D-hR-3: Remember username and password for this host in keychain
contexts.PrefAdvancedViewController.strings:HMa-V: The following settings will require restarting IINA to take effect.
contexts.PrefCodecViewController.strings:aTt-aZ-r: Measured peak brightness of the display. If set to 0, IINA detects this value. If detection fails, IINA sets the target peak to 400.
contexts.PrefCodecViewController.strings:gCv-sJ-u: Always use the dedicated GPU for rendering (if it exists). This can improve performance but may reduce battery life.
contexts.PrefCodecViewController.strings:M2M-of-g: Load the ICC profile for current display and use it to transform video RGB to screen output. (Only for SDR mode)
contexts.PrefCodecViewController.strings:mNn-cb-I: Enable tone mapping images onto the display
contexts.PrefCodecViewController.strings:szA-8r-p: Algorithm to use for tone mapping images onto the display.
contexts.PrefCodecViewController.strings:ZgQ-bc-y: Enable HDR mode by default when playing HDR videos.
contexts.PrefControlViewController.strings:6FZ-Qm: Exact seek is more precise but can cause lag and higher CPU usage.
contexts.PrefControlViewController.strings:gZK-ry: Accepts first mouse click when not focused
contexts.PrefGeneralViewController.strings:2iM-j7: Keep window open after playback finishes
contexts.PrefGeneralViewController.strings:8kU-8g: Requires restarting IINA to take effect.
contexts.PrefGeneralViewController.strings:Ci8-j2: Track all played files in "Open Recent" menu
contexts.PrefGeneralViewController.strings:i4A-86: Pause when machine goes to sleep
contexts.PrefGeneralViewController.strings:kBI-Th: Show artist and track name for audio files when available
contexts.PrefGeneralViewController.strings:KfL-r7: Switch to "music mode" automatically when playing an audio file
contexts.PrefGeneralViewController.strings:KYi-0W: Black out other monitors while in full screen
contexts.PrefGeneralViewController.strings:M0z-bI: Always open media in new window
contexts.PrefGeneralViewController.strings:QJq-fO: Add files in the same folder automatically
contexts.PrefGeneralViewController.strings:XFC-Lr: Otherwise only files that opened manually will show up in this menu.
contexts.PrefGeneralViewController.strings:YLo-6E: Quit after all windows are closed
contexts.PrefKeyBindingViewController.strings:l2M: Show the raw mpv key code and command.
contexts.PrefNetworkViewController.strings:RwW-JS: Requires restarting IINA to take effect.
contexts.PrefNetworkViewController.strings:YqE-yV: IINA will search youtube-dl in this folder. Restart needed.
contexts.PrefOSCToolbarSettingsSheetController.st: Drag an item out of the box to delete it.
Drag an item and drop it to the above box to add it.
contexts.PrefSubViewController.strings:2XY-Un-0Fg: Display subtitles in letterboxes while in full screen
contexts.PrefSubViewController.strings:7pf-Kb-TNr: Subtitles have priority when filename containing:
contexts.PrefSubViewController.strings:Luv-2B-9v8: Directories are separated by colons (:). Relative paths and wildcards (*) at the end are allowed.
contexts.PrefSubViewController.strings:Mk1-sv-QB8: Please enter a comma-separated list of strings.
contexts.PrefSubViewController.strings:OcF-0z-7qe: If enabled, all ASS subtitles will be drawn using the styles below.
contexts.PrefSubViewController.strings:QsS-wD-2hY: Also search subtitles in following directories:
contexts.PrefSubViewController.strings:vYb-qH-XkH: If enabled, IINA will automatically search online subtitles only for videos without loaded subtitles and longer than 20 mintues.
contexts.PrefSubViewController.strings:Z2M-dh-eq1: This option will be stored as ISO 639-2 language code and will work for both mpv and opensubtitles.
Toggle Picture-in-Picture by minimizing/un-minimizing the window
Show chapter position in progress bar
Show remaining time instead of total duration
Use physical resolution on Retina displays
Always show float on top status in the title bar
Display time and battery info when in full screen
Always float on top while playing
Resize the window to fit video size:
contexts.PrefUtilsViewController.strings:9uP-I0-t: The button below will delete all playback histories and entries in "Open Recent".
contexts.PrefUtilsViewController.strings:Bag-TV-S: The button below will delete all cached thumbnails.
contexts.PrefUtilsViewController.strings:e1p-Aa-W: Set IINA as the Default Application…
contexts.PrefUtilsViewController.strings:F5i-KF-2: The button below will restore all alerts that have been suppressed using the "Do not show this message again" checkbox.
contexts.PrefUtilsViewController.strings:GAo-fx-N: Open links or current webpage in IINA with one click. The website must be supported by youtube-dl.
contexts.PrefUtilsViewController.strings:pPC-q2-9: The button below will delete all files in the "watch later" folder. These files contain all saved playback progress and settings applied during playback.
contexts.PrefUtilsViewController.strings:uvK-Y1-d: Please select the media types that you want to make IINA as the default Application for.
contexts.QuickSettingViewController.strings:wBD-p: Subtitle style options may break ASS rendering, and some of them will be disabled depending on subtitle type.
contexts.SubChooseViewController.strings:vAl-Km-b: Please click to select subtitles to download:
